domain.program.name: Incident Escalation
domain.intake.purpose: Score incident severity, notify a pager service through a mock adapter, summarize remediation, and close.

artifacts.spec_yaml:
name: incident-escalation
termination: BoundedSession
topology: CyclicTopology
pure: true
preamble: |-
  Program: Incident Escalation. Score incident severity, notify a pager service through a mock adapter, summarize remediation, and close.

  This spec was synthesized mechanically by pgas-new.
initial: intake
terminal:
  - closed
features:
  - base
  - runtime_control
  - reactions
channels:
  user_text:
    direction: In
    sync: Async
  system_mode_entry:
    direction: In
    sync: Async
  widget_output:
    direction: Out
    sync: Async
  stage_output:
    direction: Out
    sync: Sync
modes:
  intake:
    vocabulary:
      - begin_work
      - record_user_note
      - session_new
      - session_abort_current
      - session_status
      - session_history
      - session_resume
      - session_help
    channels:
      - user_text
      - system_mode_entry
      - widget_output
    transitions:
      - target: severity_score
        guard:
          kind: FieldTruthy
          path: intake.started
  severity_score:
    vocabulary:
      - complete_severity_score
      - record_user_note
      - session_new
      - session_abort_current
      - session_status
      - session_history
      - session_resume
      - session_help
    channels:
      - user_text
      - widget_output
      - stage_output
    transitions:
      - target: pagerduty_adapter
        guard:
          kind: FieldTruthy
          path: severity_score.ready
  pagerduty_adapter:
    vocabulary:
      - complete_pagerduty_adapter
      - record_user_note
      - session_new
      - session_abort_current
      - session_status
      - session_history
      - session_resume
      - session_help
    channels:
      - user_text
      - widget_output
      - stage_output
    transitions:
      - target: remediation_summary
        guard:
          kind: FieldTruthy
          path: pagerduty_adapter.ready
  remediation_summary:
    vocabulary:
      - complete_remediation_summary
      - record_user_note
      - session_new
      - session_abort_current
      - session_status
      - session_history
      - session_resume
      - session_help
    channels:
      - user_text
      - widget_output
    transitions:
      - target: closed
        guard:
          kind: FieldTruthy
          path: remediation_summary.done
  closed:
    vocabulary:
      - session_status
      - session_history
      - session_help
    channels:
      - widget_output
    transitions: []
proceed_to:
  begin_work: severity_score
  complete_severity_score: pagerduty_adapter
  complete_pagerduty_adapter: remediation_summary
  complete_remediation_summary: closed
projection:
  intake:
    include:
      - inputs.user_text
      - inputs.initial_user_text
      - notebook.entries
      - notebook.pins
      - intake.started
    exclude: []
  closed:
    include:
      - inputs.initial_user_text
      - severity_score.ready
      - pagerduty_adapter.ready
      - remediation_summary.done
      - severity_score.output
      - severity_score.result_json
      - severity_score.items_json
      - pagerduty_adapter.output
      - pagerduty_adapter.result_json
      - pagerduty_adapter.items_json
      - remediation_summary.result_json
      - remediation_summary.items_json
      - remediation_summary.result
    exclude: []
  severity_score:
    include:
      - inputs.user_text
      - inputs.initial_user_text
      - notebook.entries
      - notebook.pins
      - severity_score.ready
      - severity_score.output
      - severity_score.result_json
      - severity_score.items_json
    exclude: []
  pagerduty_adapter:
    include:
      - inputs.user_text
      - inputs.initial_user_text
      - notebook.entries
      - notebook.pins
      - pagerduty_adapter.ready
      - severity_score.output
      - severity_score.result_json
      - severity_score.items_json
      - pagerduty_adapter.output
      - pagerduty_adapter.result_json
      - pagerduty_adapter.items_json
    exclude: []
  remediation_summary:
    include:
      - inputs.user_text
      - inputs.initial_user_text
      - notebook.entries
      - notebook.pins
      - remediation_summary.done
      - severity_score.output
      - severity_score.result_json
      - severity_score.items_json
      - pagerduty_adapter.output
      - pagerduty_adapter.result_json
      - pagerduty_adapter.items_json
      - remediation_summary.result_json
      - remediation_summary.items_json
      - remediation_summary.result
    exclude: []
prompts:
  intake: Capture the initial request for Incident Escalation and start the work.
  closed: Terminal mode after Incident Escalation completion is confirmed.
  severity_score: Perform the severity_score stage for Incident Escalation.
  pagerduty_adapter: Perform the pagerduty_adapter stage for Incident Escalation.
  remediation_summary: |-
    You are performing the remediation_summary stage of Incident Escalation.
    Program purpose: Score incident severity, notify a pager service through a mock adapter, summarize remediation, and close.
    Ground your reasoning in the prior stage outputs available in program state: severity_score: severity_score.output.result_json, severity_score.output.items_json; pagerduty_adapter: pagerduty_adapter.output.result_json, pagerduty_adapter.output.items_json.
    Weigh the available evidence, reach an explicit judgment for this stage, and justify it concisely.
    Do not fabricate facts that are not present in the request or prior stage outputs.
    Return your reasoning through the stage action's arguments. result_json must be a JSON object containing at least: decision (enum: proceed | blocked), summary (string), rationale (string), confidence (enum: low | medium | high), key_points (string_array; pass the argument as a JSON array string). Additional keys are allowed. items_json must be a JSON array of strings matching: remediation_summary:decision:<decision>, remediation_summary:confidence:<confidence>.
ingestion:
  user_text:
    - inputs.user_text
  system_mode_entry:
    - inputs.mode_entry
action_map:
  begin_work:
    description: Start intake and advance exactly one hop to severity_score.
    mutations:
      - op: MSet
        path: intake.started
        value: true
    channel: widget_output
  record_user_note:
    description: Record a notebook note.
    mutations:
      - op: MAppend
        path: notebook.entries
        from_arg: note
    channel: widget_output
  session_new:
    description: Control-plane new session command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  session_abort_current:
    description: Control-plane abort current session command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  session_status:
    description: Control-plane status command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  session_history:
    description: Control-plane history command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  session_resume:
    description: Control-plane resume command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  session_help:
    description: Control-plane help command.
    mutations: []
    channel: widget_output
  complete_severity_score:
    description: Run deterministic pure-compute wrapper for severity_score and advance exactly one hop to pagerduty_adapter.
    result_path: severity_score.output
    mutations:
      - op: MSet
        path: severity_score.ready
        value: true
    channel: stage_output
  complete_pagerduty_adapter:
    description: Run deterministic external-adapter wrapper for pagerduty_adapter and advance exactly one hop to remediation_summary.
    result_path: pagerduty_adapter.output
    mutations:
      - op: MSet
        path: pagerduty_adapter.ready
        value: true
    channel: stage_output
  complete_remediation_summary:
    description: Record runtime LLM reasoning output for remediation_summary and advance exactly one hop to closed.
    arg_descriptions:
      result_json: 'JSON string result for the remediation_summary LLM reasoning stage. Must encode a JSON object containing at least: decision (enum: proceed | blocked), summary (string), rationale (string), confidence (enum: low | medium | high), key_points (string_array; pass the argument as a JSON array string). Additional keys are allowed.'
      items_json: 'JSON string array of item strings produced by the remediation_summary LLM reasoning stage. Must match the templates: remediation_summary:decision:<decision>, remediation_summary:confidence:<confidence>.'
      decision: 'The explicit judgment reached by the remediation_summary stage. One of: proceed | blocked. One of: proceed | blocked.'
      summary: One-paragraph summary of the remediation_summary judgment.
      rationale: Concise justification for the remediation_summary judgment, grounded in the request and prior stage outputs.
      confidence: 'Confidence in the judgment. One of: low | medium | high. One of: low | medium | high.'
      key_points: Key evidence points supporting the remediation_summary judgment. Provide the value as a JSON array string.
    mutations:
      - op: MSet
        path: remediation_summary.done
        value: true
      - op: MSet
        path: remediation_summary.result_json
        from_arg: result_json
      - op: MSet
        path: remediation_summary.items_json
        from_arg: items_json
      - op: MSet
        path: remediation_summary.result.decision
        from_arg: decision
      - op: MSet
        path: remediation_summary.result.summary
        from_arg: summary
      - op: MSet
        path: remediation_summary.result.rationale
        from_arg: rationale
      - op: MSet
        path: remediation_summary.result.confidence
        from_arg: confidence
      - op: MSet
        path: remediation_summary.result.key_points
        from_arg: key_points
    channel: widget_output
schema:
  inputs.user_text: string
  inputs.query_result.kind: string
  inputs.query_result.value_json: object
  inputs.query_meta.source_path: string
  inputs.query_meta.source_channel: string
  inputs.query_meta.continuation_round: number
  inputs.query_meta.scope_redirect: string
  inputs.query_meta.message: string
  inputs.mode_entry: object
  inputs.mode_entry.mode: string
  inputs.mode_entry.from_mode: string
  inputs.mode_entry.entry_round: number
  governance.round_counter: number
  notebook.entries: array
  notebook.pins: array
  inputs.initial_user_text: string
  intake.started: boolean
  severity_score.ready: boolean
  pagerduty_adapter.ready: boolean
  remediation_summary.done: boolean
  severity_score.output: object
  severity_score.output.result_json: string
  severity_score.output.items_json: string
  severity_score.output.digest: string
  severity_score.result_json: string
  severity_score.items_json: string
  pagerduty_adapter.output: object
  pagerduty_adapter.output.result_json: string
  pagerduty_adapter.output.items_json: string
  pagerduty_adapter.output.digest: string
  pagerduty_adapter.result_json: string
  pagerduty_adapter.items_json: string
  pagerduty_adapter.output.adapter_kind: string
  remediation_summary.result_json: string
  remediation_summary.items_json: string
  remediation_summary.result: object
  remediation_summary.result.decision: string
  remediation_summary.result.summary: string
  remediation_summary.result.rationale: string
  remediation_summary.result.confidence: string
  remediation_summary.result.key_points: string
repair_bound: 2
fallback:
  channel: widget_output
  payload:
    ok: false
guidance:
  severity_score:
    - Use the synthesized JSON-string scalar fields for structured handler results.
    - 'delegation intake captured for this program: {"pagerduty_adapter":{"service":"pagerduty","api":"mock incident notification"}}.'
  pagerduty_adapter:
    - Use the synthesized JSON-string scalar fields for structured handler results.
    - 'delegation intake captured for this program: {"pagerduty_adapter":{"service":"pagerduty","api":"mock incident notification"}}.'
  remediation_summary:
    - Use the synthesized JSON-string scalar fields for structured handler results.
    - 'delegation intake captured for this program: {"pagerduty_adapter":{"service":"pagerduty","api":"mock incident notification"}}.'
    - 'decision (enum, one of: proceed | blocked): The explicit judgment reached by the remediation_summary stage. One of: proceed | blocked.'
    - 'summary (string): One-paragraph summary of the remediation_summary judgment.'
    - 'rationale (string): Concise justification for the remediation_summary judgment, grounded in the request and prior stage outputs.'
    - 'confidence (enum, one of: low | medium | high): Confidence in the judgment. One of: low | medium | high.'
    - 'key_points (string_array): Key evidence points supporting the remediation_summary judgment.'
    - 'items_json templates: remediation_summary:decision:<decision>, remediation_summary:confidence:<confidence>.'
    - Populate every core argument; the composite result_json must agree with the per-field arguments.
control_plane:
  version: 1
  session:
    program: incident-escalation
    binding: identity_channel_program
    concurrency:
      policy: single_active
      on_busy: reject_with_status
  free_text:
    control: ask
    bind:
      query: $text
  controls:
    ask:
      title: Ask
      aliases:
        - /ask
      args:
        query:
          type: string
          required: true
          capture: rest
      dispatch:
        - op: create_session
          as: session
          program: incident-escalation
          domain_context:
            query: $args.query
        - op: trigger
          session: $session.id
          channel: user_text
          payload: $args.query
          mode: async
    abort:
      title: Abort run
      aliases:
        - /abort
        - /stop
      availability:
        when: active_session.running
      dispatch:
        - op: abort_session
          session: $active_session.id
      presentation:
        priority: destructive
        confirm: true
    new:
      title: New session
      aliases:
        - /new
        - /reset
        - /restart
      dispatch:
        - op: create_session
          as: session
          program: incident-escalation
      presentation:
        priority: secondary
    history:
      title: Recent sessions
      aliases:
        - /history
        - /recent
      dispatch:
        - op: list_sessions
          as: sessions
      presentation:
        priority: secondary
    status:
      title: Status
      aliases:
        - /status
      availability:
        when: active_session
      dispatch:
        - op: render_session
          session: $active_session.id
          view: status
      presentation:
        priority: contextual
    resume:
      title: Resume
      aliases:
        - /resume
      availability:
        when: active_session
      dispatch:
        - op: send_runtime_control
          session: $active_session.id
          control: resume
      presentation:
        priority: contextual
    help:
      title: Help
      aliases:
        - /help
      dispatch:
        - op: render_help
      presentation:
        priority: secondary
reactions:
  capture_initial_entry_input:
    event: AfterIngestion
    watch:
      - inputs.user_text
    write_scope:
      - inputs.initial_user_text
  mirror_severity_score_output:
    event: AfterRound
    write_scope:
      - severity_score.result_json
      - severity_score.items_json
  mirror_pagerduty_adapter_output:
    event: AfterRound
    write_scope:
      - pagerduty_adapter.result_json
      - pagerduty_adapter.items_json

audit.fallback_reason: no meta-LLM provider configured; deterministic fallback contract derived from the artifact
